description_long: This is a modern, boxy sofa with a deep, rectangular profile and thick, straight armrests that are flush with the backrest. The upholstery is a rich, burnt orange fabric with a subtle, woven texture that gives it a slightly rustic yet contemporary appearance. The seat features a single, wide cushion that is integrated into the frame, while the backrest and armrests are continuous and uniform in height, creating a clean, monolithic silhouette. The sofa sits directly on the ground with no visible legs, emphasizing its solid, grounded look. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible seams, buttons, or decorative elements, making it suitable for urban parks, public waiting areas, or modern outdoor lounges. Its robust construction suggests durability and comfort for communal seating in high-traffic urban environments.
description: A boxy, burnt orange sofa with thick, straight armrests and a single integrated seat cushion, upholstered in subtly textured fabric. The design is minimalist and monolithic, with no visible legs or decorative details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, straight armrest and the continuous, blocky profile of the sofa.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, integrated seat cushion and the uniform height of the armrests and backrest.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the left, again showing the solid armrest and the sofa's deep seat.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted, rectangular back with no visible seams or features.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, wide, integrated seat cushion with a continuous, attached backrest; all cushions are uniform in size and fixed in place.
attribute_armrest_style: Thick, straight armrests at the same height as the backrest, forming a continuous rectangular profile with no decorative elements or padding contrast.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the sofa base sits flush with the ground, giving a solid, monolithic appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest at medium height, integrated with the armrests and seat, with no segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Subtle, woven texture in a solid burnt orange color; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
